blocks.text: Camp Nou miracle night: Barça trail 4-0, Atlético need nothing
Trailing 4-0 on aggregate, Barcelona need a 4-0 win minimum just to reach extra time — and 5-0 to advance outright. Atlético arrive at Camp Nou as kings. This is survival territory.
⚽ Wed 21:00 — El Derbi Vasco: Athletic Club must overturn 1-0 deficit at Real Sociedad, Reale Arena
🏎️ Fri 02:30 — F1 season opens: Australian Grand Prix, Melbourne
